title: Benefits of an open and competitive legal economy
body: " This report and its contents are independent from government and do not represent government policy.   The Ministry of Justice commissioned Hook Tangaza - an independent, specialist advisory firm that focuses on the legal sector - to analyse the numerous economic, trade, and innovation benefits of the UK’s liberalised legal services market.   The report explores how the UK’s liberal, well-regulated legal services market underpins its economic success and strengthens the UK’s global reputation for the rule of law. Drawing on economic data and sector insights, the report highlights:   legal services reform and the sector’s connection to growth how openness and competition support inward investment and trade how liberalisation drives innovation in UK legal services  "
